top_signals.title: Plastics Shortages to Keep Food Prices High After War Disruptions
top_signals.summary: Asian consumers will be facing higher grocery bills for months thanks to costly packaging stemming from the Iran war, which created severe shortages of plastics needed to get food from farms to market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: HYPE down 22% from record highs: Will spot demand revive the uptrend?
top_signals.summary: HYPE price drops near a key support zone where fading selling pressure collides with shrinking futures market activity. Will the altcoin resume its uptrend above $60?
